items.title: 3 growth juggernauts can power 24% surge in Solar Industries shares, says Elara after initiating with Buy
items.summary: Elara Capital has initiated coverage on Solar Industries with a 'Buy' rating and a target price of Rs 15,450, forecasting a 24% upside. The brokerage highlights three key growth drivers: a booming defence portfolio, aggressive global expansion across 90 countries, and a robust Rs 2,200 crore capital expenditure plan.

items.title: Indian currency, Indian bonds, Indian equities are all cheap now: Manish Chokhani
items.summary: Indian markets are showing signs of recovery after a significant selloff. Experts suggest that Indian currency, bonds, and equities are currently undervalued. Hopes for a ceasefire in the Middle East conflict have led to a drop in oil prices. This development is expected to calm market volatility and potentially trigger a buying spree.

items.title: Attractive valuations emerging, but oil prices hold the key: Aman Chowhan
items.summary: Indian equities are experiencing a sharp correction due to geopolitical tensions, with valuations becoming attractive. However, elevated oil prices and conflict duration pose significant risks, potentially impacting trade deficits and currencies. Investors are advised to focus on reasonably valued stocks, with engineering, EPC, and IT midcaps showing promise.

items.title: As Asim Munir pitches peace, Iran stops Pakistan's cargo ship at Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Pakistan Ship stopped by Iran in Strait of Hormuz: Iran has denied passage to a Karachi-bound vessel in the Strait of Hormuz, citing protocol violations and lack of clearance. This action, coupled with a potential $2 million transit fee, signals Iran's tighter control over the crucial oil route amid escalating regional tensions.

items.title: Dividend alert! TVS Holdings announces Rs 86 interim dividend; check record date
items.summary: TVS Holdings has declared an interim dividend of Rs 86 per equity share, amounting to a 1,720% payout on its 2.02 crore shares. The record date for this dividend is April 2, with payments expected within 30 days. The company also raised Rs 650 crore through non-convertible debentures.

items.title: Retail investors cut holdings in 14 midcaps; stocks fall up to 45% in 6 months
items.summary: Retail investors trimmed stakes in 96 Nifty Midcap 150 stocks amid weak performance, with many declining sharply over six months, signaling fading confidence and cautious sentiment toward select midcap companies.

items.title: RPSG shares rocket 20% after RCB's Rs 16,600 crore deal lifts valuation benchmark for IPL teams
items.summary: Shares of RPSG Ventures rose sharply after United Spirits sold the Royal Challengers Bengaluru franchise for Rs 16,600 crore, setting a new benchmark for IPL valuations. The record deal has lifted sentiment for listed franchise owners, including RPSG’s Lucknow SuperGiants stake.

items.title: Meet The Top Contenders For The Women’s Figure Skating World Title
items.summary: As Olympic champion Alysa Liu skips the 2026 World Championships, Kaori Sakamoto, Amber Glenn and Ami Nakai head to Prague to battle for gold. Meet the top contenders for the world title in women's figure skating.

items.title: Podcasting Metrics Deliver For Brands, Podcasters, And Consumers
items.summary: Through advanced metrics from companies like Oxford Road, podcasting has the advantage of collecting more specific and accurate metrics to make key decisions on advertising, content, and performance.

items.title: Billionaire Kumar Birla, Blackstone To Buy Royal Challengers For $1.8 Billion Amid Bidding Frenzy For Indian Cricket Teams
items.summary: Billionaire Kumar Mangalam Birla joins other high-profile owners of Indian Premier League cricket teams including Asia’s wealthiest, Mukesh Ambani, whose Reliance Industries owns the Mumbai Indians.

items.title: A Woman’s Place Is In The Drone War: How Technology Changes Attitudes
items.summary: Mariia Berlinska, Ukraine’s “Mother of Drones,” says drone technology has helped women secure their rightful place on the front lines.

items.title: Estée Lauder And Puig Brands Merger Talks Divide Street Analysts
items.summary: The possible merger of a fast rising European powerhouse and an American icon has split opinions after a tricky year for the latter, hit by tariffs and with shares down.

items.title: Cunard Raises The Stakes For Luxury Cruising—Before You Set Sail
items.summary: Cunard’s exclusive partnership with celebrity fashion stylist Micaela Erlanger offers Grill Suite guests an unexpected, curated experience before the voyage begins.

items.title: How To Watch Yankees Vs. Giants MLB Opening Night 2026 On Netflix
items.summary: This is everything you need to know about MLB opening night, where the Yankees face off against the Giants on Netflix.

items.title: Blue Jays Manager Sends Daulton Varsho Contract Message
items.summary: Toronto Blue Jays skipper John Schneider revealed the contract reason that he wouldn’t name the slugging outfielder as a preseason MVP.
